(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (questions q
     JOIN test_series ts ON ((ts.id = q.test_series_id)))
  WHERE ((q.id = options.question_id) AND (ts.is_free = true))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ((questions q
     JOIN test_series ts ON ((ts.id = q.test_series_id)))
     LEFT JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = auth.uid())))
  WHERE ((q.id = options.question_id) AND ((ts.is_free = true) OR ((p.subscription_status = 'active'::text) AND (p.subscription_expiry > now()))))))
